data.title: Robust Authentication
data.description: Ensures user identity with strong authentication protocols.

data.title: Protection Against DDoS
data.description: Safeguard measures against distributed denial-of-service attacks.
data.technical_spec: Leverages rate limiting and Web Application Firewall (WAF).

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Frequent audits to identify and fix vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Third-party penetration testing and internal code reviews.

data.title: Data Privacy Measures
data.technical_spec: Implementation of GDPR guidelines and privacy policies.
